title: NASA Aeronautics Research
description: A NASA source card about aviation research, aircraft design, and flight systems.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Aeronautics resources explain research into flight safety, aircraft design, air traffic systems, sustainable aviation, and experimental vehicles.
Use this source for engineering reading where students connect forces, design constraints, testing, data, and environmental goals.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, insignia, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
